beats.action: Lyra is driven to one knee, her sword trembling as she holds up a faltering barrier of pure qi against undulating tendrils of black, corrupted energy that lash against the stone walls.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Lyra, slight pan to show the encroaching corruption

dialogue.text: My barrier... it's fracturing. There is no rhythm to its strikes, no honor in its form. I can't find an opening!

beats.action: Kaelen stands behind Lyra, his eyes darting across the swirling black currents, fingers twitching as he runs calculations.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: pale, coldly analytical yet with an undercurrent of panic

beats.camera: medium shot on Kaelen, subtle zoom on his calculating eyes

dialogue.text: It is a closed loop of infinite kinetic conversion. Every traditional strike we offer is simply absorbed and redirected back at us. Our survival probability in this gorge is rapidly approaching zero.

beats.action: Master Valerius steps past Lyra and Kaelen. His heavy iron armor groans under the atmospheric pressure.

expression.master_valerius_ironhearts_price: unyielding posture, deep ancient sorrow as he looks at Kaelen

beats.camera: tracking shot, following Valerius as he moves forward, then a medium shot on his face

beats.action: Valerius holds Kaelen's gaze, speaking with grave deliberation.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Valerius, slight shift to Kaelen's reaction

dialogue.text: Because you are calculating the strength of the tide, Kaelen, not the nature of the vessel. Every power has its price. To hollow oneself out for this corruption... it leaves a void.

beats.action: Valerius closes his eyes. A blinding, golden fire begins to seep from the seams of his armor, igniting his meridians from the inside out. The air around him combusts.

expression.master_valerius_ironhearts_price: eyes closed, grim determination, internal agony

beats.camera: close-up on Valerius's face and armor, showing the golden light intensifying

beats.action: Lyra looks on in terror as Valerius burns his life-force.
beats.camera: medium shot on Lyra, then cuts back to Valerius with the golden aura

dialogue.text: Master, stop! You are burning your soul-core! We can retreat, we can find another way!

beats.action: Valerius, radiating intense golden heat, turns his head slightly towards Lyra and Kaelen.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Valerius, golden light flaring around him

dialogue.text: There is no retreat from this agent, child. Kaelen, memorize this.

beats.action: Valerius focuses intensely on Kaelen, imparting crucial information.
beats.camera: close-up on Valerius's face, then a quick cut to Kaelen's wide, absorbing eyes

dialogue.text: The entity does not generate the corruption; it channels it. The anchor point is beneath its left collarbone, where the physical heart was torn away. You must strike it precisely when the tide of shadow ebbs to draw more power.

beats.action: Valerius roars, launching himself directly into the heart of the black vortex. His golden light clashes violently with the darkness, creating a temporary, blinding sanctuary.
beats.camera: wide shot, showing Valerius's golden charge into the black mass, explosion of light

beats.action: Lyra watches in horror, reaching out a desperate hand towards the clashing lights.
beats.camera: medium close-up on Lyra, her hand reaching out of frame, background a blur of clashing light

beats.action: The corruption begins to dissolve Valerius's armor, devouring his flesh in real time, as he utters his final words.
beats.camera: close-up on Valerius's face amidst the golden light and encroaching darkness, showing the corruption taking hold

dialogue.text: Live... and pay the price, Architect. Do not let this cost be in vain.

beats.action: A deafening detonation of spiritual light shatters the gorge. The shockwave flings Lyra backward into the dust. The golden aura is snuffed out completely, leaving only drifting ash.
beats.camera: wide shot of the gorge, explosion of light and force, then tracking shot as Lyra is thrown backward

beats.action: Kaelen stands motionless amidst the dust, his eyes wide, his perfect memory instantly locking onto the exact coordinates and timing of the agent's hidden weakness.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: wide-eyed, stunned, intensely focused, memory processing

beats.camera: medium close-up on Kaelen's face, slow push in on his eyes as knowledge settles
